id.description: Unique identifier of the delivery failure.

GetSubscriptionListResponse.description: A list response format for subscriptions.

count.description: The number of subscription objects returned in the `items` array for the current request.

items.description: An array of subscription objects, each representing a unique subscription.

offset.description: The zero-based index in the complete list of retrieved subscriptions that marks the beginning of the response.

total.description: The total number of subscriptions available in the system that match the provided query or filters.

eventFilter.description: The filter to apply to events.

eventType.description: The type of event to subscribe. [Events Standard](https://developer.greenlake.hpe.com/docs/greenlake/services/event/public/events/)

RecentDeliveriesResponse.description: Provides a list of RecentDeliveriesResponse objects

count.description: The number of failure response objects contained in the `items` array for the current response.

items.description: An array of failure response objects that detail each failed delivery attempt associated with a specific webhook.

offset.description: The zero-based index in the complete list of failures that marks the start of the current set of data.

total.description: The total number of delivery failures recorded in the system that match the provided query or filters.

RecentDeliveryResponse.description: Details about a delivery incident, supporting both single and batch deliveries.

createdAt.description: The date and time the webhook delivery happened.

description.description: Human-readable description of the delivery. For single event deliveries, this is the event type. For batch deliveries, this is a string like "Batch of 10 events".

failureId.description: Unique identifier of the delivery failure.

httpResponseCode.description: HTTP Error Code returned by the destination

id.description: Unique identifier of the delivery. For batch deliveries, this is the batch ID; for single deliveries, the cloudevent ID.

responseBody.description: The body of the response from the webhook.

createdBy.description: The user that created the subscription.

eventFilter.description: The filter to apply to events.

friendlyName.description: UI friendly title for the event Type.

generation.description: Monotonically increasing update counter to track the subscription version.

updatedAt.description: The last date and time the subscription is updated.

updatedBy.description: The user that updated the subscription.

endpointRateLimit.description: The rate limit (requests per minute) allowed by the webhook endpoint. This value is determined during webhook verification when the endpoint responds with a WebHook-Allowed-Rate header. A value of -1 indicates unlimited rate, positive integers specify requests per minute, and null indicates no rate limit has been specified by the endpoint.

batching.description: Indicates whether the webhook uses batching.

challengeRequestEnabled.description: If set to false, no challenge requests will be sent to webhook

clientSecret.description: Client Secret used for Oauth Authentication

destination.description: The URL where events will be sent.

secondarySecret.description: A secret for verifying the authenticity of incoming requests.

secret.description: A secret for verifying the authenticity of incoming requests.

dualSecret.description: Indicates whether the webhook uses dual secret authentication.

endpointRateLimit.description: The rate limit (requests per minute) allowed by the webhook endpoint. This value is determined during webhook verification when the endpoint responds with a WebHook-Allowed-Rate header. A value of -1 indicates unlimited rate, positive integers specify requests per minute, and null indicates no rate limit has been specified by the endpoint.

get.description:
Retrieves a list of subscriptions associated to webhooks, organized in descending order based on their creation time.

**Pagination**: This endpoint exclusively supports offset-based pagination.

**Filtering**: Following are the supported filter parameters : `webhookId`

parameters.description: Specifies the number of results to be returned. The default value is 10.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Specifies the zero-based resource offset to start the response from. The default value is 0.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Filter subscriptions events using an [OData V4](https://www.odata.org/documentation/) formatted filter string.

FilterWithWebhookId.description: Returns subscriptions for a user within a particular webhook.

parameters.name: filter

schema.description:
Filter data using a subset of OData 4.0 and return only the subset of resources that match the filter.
Get list of subscriptions that can be filtered by:
- webhookId
schema.title: Filter
